mapper.select: SELECT v.*, e.ename FROM vender v JOIN emp e ON v.emp_num = e.emp_num order by v.vender_num DESC
SELECT v.*, e.ename FROM vender v JOIN emp e ON v.emp_num = e.emp_num WHERE v.vender_num = #{vender_num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vender ( vender_num, vender_name, vender_type, vender_phone, vender_addr, ven_ename, biz_no, emp_num ) VALUES ( vender_seq.nextval, #{vender_name}, #{vender_type}, #{vender_phone}, #{vender_addr}, #{ven_ename}, #{biz_no}, #{emp_num} )
mapper.select: select emp_num, ename from emp where status = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE vender SET vender_name = #{vender_name}, vender_type = #{vender_type}, vender_phone = #{vender_phone}, vender_addr = #{vender_addr}, ven_ename = #{ven_ename}, biz_no = #{biz_no}, emp_num = #{emp_num} WHERE vender_num = #{vender_num}
